name: Koil Energy Solutions, Inc.
business: Koil Energy is an energy services company that provides equipment and support services to the world’s energy and offshore industries. It designs, manufactures, and installs subsea distribution equipment such as flying leads, umbilical hardware, and provides engineering, project management, spooling, testing, storage, and refurbishment services. Its primary customers are major integrated, large independent, and foreign national energy companies involved in offshore oil and gas exploration and production.
sellsTo: offshore wind, offshore wave energy, hydrogen, and liquefied natural gas markets

exposures.sentence: The Company primarily serves the offshore oil and gas market;

the Company’s product offerings and service capabilities are based on core competencies that are energy source agnostic and can be applied to additional markets, including offshore wind, offshore wave energy, hydrogen, and liquefied natural gas.

tamClaims.claim: Expected increase in subsea tree awards from 247 in 2025 to 296 in 2026, a 20% increase.
tamClaims.sentence: For both green fields and brown fields, industry analysts, such as Westwood Global Energy Group on March 6, 2026, reported an expected increase from 247 subsea tree awards in 2025 to 296 awards in 2026, a 20% increase.
